meta.title: Sample STEM Quiz
meta.description: Demonstrates every supported question type, images, weighted rubrics, numeric ranges, and multi-part grouping.

contexts.title: Options desk whiteboard
contexts.body: A trader is reviewing the Greeks for a short-dated call spread. Use the next three parts together: first read the payoff diagram, then match the symbols, then explain the intuition in prose.

contexts.title: Mars outpost briefing
contexts.body: A research crew is preparing a pressurized habitat on Mars. Solar arrays provide 15 kW at peak output and charge a 50 kWh battery bank overnight. Deliveries arrive in this order: cargo lander, power module, crew vehicle. Use this shared context for the final ordering question.

feedback.correct: Great! The power rule applies here.
feedback.incorrect: Remember the power rule: multiply by the exponent and subtract one.
Only numbers divisible by 1 and themselves are prime.

questions.text: Fill in the blank: The chemical symbol for water is _____.

image.url: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='480' height='240' viewBox='0 0 480 240'%3E%3Crect width='480' height='240' fill='%23f8fafc'/%3E%3Cline x1='40' y1='200' x2='440' y2='200' stroke='%2394a3b8' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Cline x1='240' y1='30' x2='240' y2='210' stroke='%2394a3b8' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Cpath d='M70 190 C140 190 180 160 240 120 C300 80 340 50 410 50' fill='none' stroke='%230f172a' stroke-width='4'/%3E%3Ctext x='320' y='72' fill='%230f172a' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'%3EConvex payoff%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E
image.alt: A convex payoff diagram rising faster as spot price increases.
image.caption: Use the convex payoff sketch to estimate a plausible annualized volatility band.

questions.text: Looking at the convex payoff sketch, what annualized volatility range would be a plausible estimate for this short-dated structure?
Match each Greek symbol to the closest definition.

options.label: Rate of change of option value with respect to spot
Change in delta as spot moves
Sensitivity of value to the passage of time

questions.text: Using the payoff sketch and the matching definitions, explain why traders care about gamma as expiry approaches.

rubrics.title: States the principle
rubrics.description: Explains that gamma measures how quickly delta changes as spot moves.

rubrics.title: Connects to trading impact
rubrics.description: Links high gamma near expiry to re-hedging frequency, nonlinearity, or risk management decisions.

rubrics.title: Clarity
rubrics.description: Provides a coherent explanation that is understandable to another student.

feedback.incorrect: A human or LLM grader should review this response using the provided rubrics.

questions.text: Order the steps mission control follows to bring the habitat online after the cargo lander arrives. The options below are shuffled by default; set the optional `shuffleItems` flag to false if you want to keep the authored order instead.
items: Deploy and orient the solar array
correctOrder: Deploy and orient the solar array
